results.rendered_html:
1. raṇya (von ran)
1〉 adj. ergötzlich, erfreulich: indrāya somo raṇyo madāya  ṚV. 9,96,9 . prajāpatiḥ pṛthivīṃ raṇyāṃ naḥ kṛṇotu  AV. 12,1,43 .
— b〉 kampftüchtig: ubhā te bāhū raṇyā susaṃskṛtā  ṚV. 8,66,1 .
— 2〉 n.
a〉 Ergötzlichkeit, Freude: pra raṇyāni raṇyavāco bharante  ṚV. 3,55,7 .
— b〉 Kampf: made somasya raṇyāni cakrire  ṚV. 1,85,10 . yasya śaśvatpapivā~ indra śatrūnanānukṛtyā raṇyā cakartha 10,112,5 .
